sourceFindings.detail: Page uses raw button markup where the component contract requires an Ark UI button mapping.
Hard-coded border color is used instead of the canonized border token.
Shell header and rail structure match the current shell contract.

renderedFindings.detail: Night mode card border color does not match the night token contract.
Hero heading line-height does not match the canonized heading contract.

fixesApplied: Replaced raw button markup with the required Ark UI mapped component.
Swapped hard-coded border color to the canonized border token.
Adjusted hero heading line-height to match the typography contract.
Aligned night mode card border token with the day/night contract.
